name: io.github.codespar/mcp-coinbase-cdp
description: MCP server for Coinbase Developer Platform (CDP) — single package covering three product surfaces (Trading, Wallets, Payments) under one CDP key. ES256 JWT auth signed with an ECDSA P-256 private key minted at portal.cdp.coinbase.com; each request carries a fresh JWT bound to METHOD + path with a 2-minute exp.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_CDP_KEY_NAME
environmentVariables.description: CDP key id of the form organizations/<org>/apiKeys/<id>. Mint at https://portal.cdp.coinbase.com.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_CDP_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: PEM-encoded ECDSA P-256 private key downloaded once at mint time from https://portal.cdp.coinbase.com. Pass the full PEM including BEGIN/END lines.
